allowed_sources.name: existing_unprocessed_adelin_v2_artifacts
conditions: reference_or_entry_fields are present or reconstructable without future leakage
different sample definitions are not silently mixed

allowed_sources.name: forward_new_collection
conditions: not selected based on H3/H4 states
not selected based on TP/SL, PnL, MFE/MAE, or post-entry behavior

allowed_sources.name: broader_historical_ohlc_mining
allowed_sources.reason: Requires a separate pre-registered mining rule because it introduces different discovery bias.

preferred_sources: existing Adelin v2 candidate/sample artifacts with explicit EXISTING_METADATA direction confidence-3
newly collected Adelin v2 candidate/sample artifacts with explicit EXISTING_METADATA direction confidence-3
recommended_primary_sourcing_rule.insufficient_sample_policy: If fewer than 60 total confidence-3 samples are available, report INSUFFICIENT_CONFIDENCE_3_SAMPLE rather than lowering the gate.

reason_h3_h4_not_quotas: H3/H4 are the proxies being evaluated. Selecting samples based on H3/H4 states would bias the diagnostic.
